scripts.build: npm run build -w @proxyscope/core && npm run build -w @proxyscope/cli && npm run build -w @upgradewatch/core && npm run build -w @upgradewatch/api
scripts.test: npm run test -w @proxyscope/core && npm run test -w @upgradewatch/core
scripts.test:run: npm run test:run -w @proxyscope/core && npm run test:run -w @upgradewatch/core
